## Downloads

| Platform | File | Install |
|---|---|---|
| **Mac** | `EditSync.dmg` | Open the DMG, drag EditSync to Applications. First launch: **right-click the app → Open → Open** (one time — the app is unsigned). |
| **Windows** | `EditSync-windows.zip` | Unzip anywhere, open `EditSync.exe`. |

ffmpeg is bundled — nothing else to install.

## What it does

Drop everything you filmed (DJI Action + Meta glasses), press **Sync my
footage**, and drag the produced `.fcpxml` into Final Cut Pro: every
glasses clip lands on its own layer at the exact audio-matched moment,
playing its own sound, with the main camera automatically muted and
blurred behind it. Full guide: `docs/APP_GUIDE.md`.
